title: Connecting Monday to Workato
excerpt:
Hey Team, 
Hope you are well. 
I am trying to connect to Harvest timesheets using our no-code integration platform called Workato. 
Just wondering if anyone has connected to Monday using Workato? 
Cheers 
ry

posts.author: ryandsouza (Ryan DSouza)
